confirmedStack.corrections: landingpage-spec.md is authoritative. Keep the landing page static-first, keep the YouTube flow consent-gated, and keep video zones as pinned highlights plus filtered feed shorts.
confirmedPatterns: zone components live in src/components and are composed from src/pages/index.astro
customer-facing content and section metadata live in src/data/*.ts
global design tokens and motion helpers live in src/styles/global.css
interactive behavior uses small inline scripts inside Astro components instead of a client framework
